basic_details.job_title: BEE Deputy Director General Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) has released the BEEDeputy Director General Recruitment 2026 notification for 1Deputy Director General post on Deputation or Short-Term Contract basis. This prestigious central government job opportunity is open to experienced professionals from Central/State Governments, Public Sector Undertakings, Universities, and recognized research or statutory organizations with strong backgrounds in energy planning, management, research, or industrial development.

age_limit.age_details: Max 56 years for deputation, Max 50 years for short-term contract.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for deputation: 56 years. Maximum age limit for short-term contract: 50 years.

qualification.details: Officers of Central or State Government or Union Territories or Public Sector Undertakings, or Universities, or Recognized Research Institutions, or Autonomous or Statutory Organizations holding analogous posts on regular basis OR with three years' service in Level-13 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix (Pre-revised scale of pay PB-4 Rs.37400-67000 with grade pay of Rs. 8700) or equivalent. Master's Degree in Physics or Chemistry of Economics or Applied Economics or Business or Finance or Industrial Economics or Energy Planning and Economics from a recognized University; or Bachelor' Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. Minimum of sixteen (16) years of experience in research or development or design or industrial or academic activities in Government Departments, Public Sector Undertakings, Universities, or Research institutions, Autonomous or Statutory Organizations. Of the 16 years of experience, two (2) years be at a senior level in energy planning or energy management.

salary_details.details: Level 14 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix (Pre-revised PB-4 Rs.37400-67000 + Grade Pay Rs.10,000)

selection_process: Deputation or Short Term Contract basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEEDeputy Director General Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.beeindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEE Deputy Director General (Technical) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the BEE Deputy Director General (Technical) post is 14-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Physics, Chemistry, Economics, Applied Economics, Business, Finance, Industrial Economics, Energy Planning and Economics, or a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for the Deputy Director General (Technical) position?
faq.answer: A minimum of sixteen (16) years of experience in research, development, design, industrial, or academic activities is required. Two of these years must be at a senior level in energy planning or energy management.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 56 years for deputation and 50 years for a short-term contract.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Director General (Technical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be placed at Level 14 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, which includes a pre-revised pay scale of PB-4 Rs.37400-67000 with a Grade Pay of Rs.10,000.

faq.question: Q6. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in offline mode. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Deputy Director General (Technical).

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is on a Deputation or Short Term Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE), which is www.beeindia.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: Completed applications should be sent to the Office of Secretary, Bureau of Energy Efficiency, 4th Floor, Sewa Bhawan, R. K. Puram, New Delhi - 110066.
